title: Basic JavaScript Todo App
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Todo App. Focus on implementing CRUD operations correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Todo App
description: Create a function that uses CRUD operations and Local storage persistence together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Todo App Project
description: Build a small application that applies CRUD operations, Local storage persistence, Task filtering (all, active, completed) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Todo App
description: The following code has bugs related to CRUD operations. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Todo App
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with CRUD operations and Local storage persistence.
